tagline: Fort Lauderdale & Miami's Premier Luxury Pool Design, Leak Detection & Concierge Care

hero.headline:
Award-Winning Pools Built for
How You Live
hero.subheadline: From custom infinity-edge designs to concierge-level weekly care, Somar Pools brings 25+ years of luxury pool expertise to South Florida. We handle every detail so you simply enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Luxury Pool Services From<br class="hidden md:block"> Design to Daily Care
services.subtitle: Whether you dream of a show-stopping infinity pool or need expert leak detection, Somar Pools delivers award-winning craftsmanship and concierge-level attention to every project.

cards.title: Custom Luxury Pool Design
cards.description: Award-winning pool design and construction including infinity-edge, saline systems, and architectural masterpieces tailored to your South Florida lifestyle.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Renovation
cards.description: Transform your aging pool into a modern showpiece with expert resurfacing, premium tile, updated equipment, and design-forward upgrades.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Professional-grade leak detection that pinpoints problems fast. We resolve leaks quickly, saving water and preventing costly structural damage.

cards.title: Concierge Pool Maintenance
cards.description: VIP weekly care including chemical balancing, equipment checks, and thorough cleaning. Your pool stays pristine without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool Automation & Smart Systems
cards.description: Jandy iAqualink automation, TruSense chemistry monitoring, and AquaPure salinity control. Manage your pool effortlessly from your phone.

cards.title: Spa Service & Commercial Pools
cards.description: Full spa repair and maintenance plus professional commercial pool service for hotels, condos, and resort properties across South Florida.

how_it_works.headline: Your Luxury Pool in Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. Mario and the team will visit your property, discuss design possibilities, and provide a transparent, detailed proposal — no pressure, no hidden fees.

steps.title: We Craft Your Vision
steps.description: Our award-winning team handles every detail — from custom design and permitting through construction and automation setup. You stay informed at every milestone.

steps.title: Dive Into Your Dream Pool
steps.description: Your finished pool is pristine and ready. Choose our concierge maintenance to keep it that way year-round, or call us whenever you need expert care.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts Somar
about.headline: Family Roots, Luxury Results — 25+ Years Deep
about.description: Founded by Mario Ramos, who grew up in his family's pool business in the Northeast for over 15 years, Somar Pools was built to change the way swimming pools are cared for. Now with 25+ years of expertise and six consecutive Houzz Design Awards, our team has worked on some of the most elaborate pools in the world — from Fort Lauderdale estates to the Caribbean island of Anguilla. Every project gets the same attention to detail that earned us the Pinnacle Design Award for a 600-sq-ft suspended saline infinity-edge pool.

features.title: Licensed FL Pool Contractor
features.description: Ranked in the top 10% of 191,428 Florida licensed contractors on BuildZoom. Fully licensed, insured, and BBB A+ rated.

features.title: Concierge-Level VIP Service
features.description: We treat every client like our only client. Responsive communication, on-time arrivals, and meticulous attention to detail on every visit.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Excellence
features.description: Six consecutive Houzz Design Awards, a Pinnacle Design Award, and featured in Luxury Pools + Outdoor Living magazine.

pricing.headline: Transparent Luxury Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-quoted to your property and vision. No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch — just honest pricing for world-class pool work.

guarantee.headline: Our "Concierge Care" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, we will return and make it right at no additional charge. That is the Somar Pools standard — the same attention to detail that earned us six Houzz Design Awards goes into every single visit, every single pool.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom luxury pool projects take 8-16 weeks depending on design complexity, permitting, and scope. Mario will give you a detailed timeline during your consultation. We keep you updated at every milestone so there are never surprises.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool permits and approvals?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. As a licensed Florida pool contractor, we handle all permitting, inspections, and municipal approvals. You focus on choosing your tile and planning your first pool party — we handle the paperwork.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in South Florida?
faqs.answer: We serve Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties including Miami Beach, Golden Beach, Coral Gables, Las Olas Isles, Harbor Beach, Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Hallandale Beach, Key Biscayne, and surrounding luxury communities.

faqs.question: What makes your maintenance service different?
faqs.answer: We call it concierge care for a reason. Your dedicated technician arrives on schedule every week with thorough chemical balancing, equipment checks, and cleaning. You get VIP-level communication and a pool that is always swim-ready.

faqs.question: Can you fix a pool that was poorly built by someone else?
faqs.answer: Yes, and we do it often. Our team specializes in diagnosing and correcting poor craftsmanship from other contractors. From leak detection to full renovation, we will make it right and build it to last.

testimonials.name: Ryan F.
testimonials.text: Mario knows how to take an idea on paper and turn it into reality. His attention to detail and work ethic are unmatched.

testimonials.name: Adrienne S.
testimonials.text: Reliable, responsive, a pleasure to work with. It's like VIP service is their regular thing.

testimonials.name: Rebecca L.
testimonials.text: Great service and quality of work. They did an excellent job on our pool remodel with no hidden costs, cheap materials or shadiness.
